message: 🌱 Add cilium: CFP: Add support for k8s Gateway API mission (#358)

@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cilium-20655-cfp-add-support-for-k8s-gateway-api",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cilium: CFP: Add support for k8s Gateway API",
+    "description": "CFP: Add support for k8s Gateway API. This issue affects 61+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify cilium feature symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your cilium deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=cilium\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors related to: CFP: Add support for k8s Gateway API"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Service configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cilium resources:\n```bash\nkubectl get service -A\nkubectl describe service <name> -n <namespace>\n```\n## Cilium Feature Proposal\n\nThis issue is to discuss and track for [k8s API Gateway][1] work mentioned in [roadmap][2]. Kindly note that the actual work or implementation might vary based on the discu"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for CFP: Add support for k8s Gateway API",
+        "description": "This PR changes the naming of Envoy Listeners and Routes resources.\nTo avoid possible name clashing between resources in different namespaces, each Envoy Listener and Route name is prepended with its CEC namespace and name.\nThis is done while translating the CEC specifications to generate the Envoy config, and not during CEC creation. Thanks to this, a user generated CEC does not need to use the format <cecNamespace-cecName-resourceName> to be similar to an operator-generated CEC.\n\nRelates #1969\n\nSee the fix PR for details: linked PR"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm CFP: Add support for k8s Gateway API is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The root cause is: This PR changes the naming of Envoy Listeners and Routes resources.\nTo avoid possible name clashing between resources in different namespaces, each Envoy Listener and Route name is prepended with its CEC namespace and name.\nThis is done while translating the CEC specifications to generate the Envoy config, and not during CEC creation. Thanks to this, a user generated CEC does not need to use the f. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
